title: $rtrim
text: $rtrim Trim a string on the right-hand side, following a pattern. $rtrim ( Source , Pattern ) Example: vOutput = $rtrim("Unifacexxxx","x") Parameters Table 1. Parameters Parameter Data Type Description Source String String to be trimmed on the right-hand side. Pattern String Pattern to remove. It can be a constant string, regex string, or syntax string. For more information, see Syntax Strings for Pattern Matching and Regex Strings for Pattern Matching . Return Values Trimmed string. Use Allowed in all component types. Description The $rtrim function is used to right trim a string following a pattern. Example: Using $rtrim vInput="UNIFACExxxx" vOutput = $rtrim(vInput,"x") ; vOutput now contains "UNIFACE" Copy Explain this code vString = $rtrim("xxxxUnifacexxxx",$regex("x")) ; vString now is "xxxxUniface" vString = $rtrim("xxxx",$regex("x")) ; vString now is "" vString = $rtrim("uniface1111234567890111",$regex("\d")) ; vString now is "uniface" Copy Related Links $ltrim Trim the left side of a string from the left, following a pattern.
